brand.name: Heita
brand.tagline: Loyalty, messaging, and AI workspaces in one mobile-first system.

landing.intro: Heita gives retailers and small businesses a direct line to their customers — through WhatsApp, QR, and a fast, installable app that works on the data plans South Africans actually use.

features.joinDescription: QR codes in store, on receipts, on product tags, on a WhatsApp message, or a direct link — every entry lands on the same business profile.
features.messagingDescription: SMS, WhatsApp, push, and in-app notifications converge into one timeline per customer, governed by your team.
features.aiDescription: Each shop trains a document-aware AI on its own catalog, FAQs, and policies. Ollama by default, cloud fallback when you need it.
features.loyaltyDescription: Tiers, rewards, promotions, signup bonuses and event reminders, all wired into one wallet your customer can carry anywhere.
features.pwaDescription: Installable, offline-aware, and fast on the data plans South Africans actually use. No app store gatekeeping.
features.trustDescription: Verified WhatsApp webhooks, rate-limited OTPs, CSP locked down, tenants isolated by row-level policies.

auth.signInBlurb: We only issue sign-in codes to verified phone numbers. New customers should create an account first.
auth.signUpBlurb: We verify your phone number before creating an account so recycled SIMs cannot silently take over an identity.
auth.providerSuffix: Google and Apple sign-in appear automatically when configured.
auth.errorOAuthEmailMissing: Your Google or Apple account did not share an email address. Sign in with your phone number instead.
auth.errorAccountDeactivated: This account has been deactivated. Contact support@heita.co.za if you believe this is a mistake.
auth.errorOAuthAccountLinkRequired: An account already exists with this email. Sign in with your phone first, then link Google or Apple from your profile.

home.summarySingle: You belong to {count} business and have {points} total points in your wallet.
home.summaryPlural: You belong to {count} businesses and have {points} total points in your wallet.
home.searchPlaceholder: Find a business by name, suburb, or category…
home.discoveryMatches: {count, plural, =0 {0 matches} one {1 match} other {# matches}}
home.noResults: No public businesses matched this search. Try a category or suburb instead.
home.emptyBody: Scan a QR code at a participating store, open a WhatsApp join link, or tap a join button on a business profile to start earning points.

wallet.totalPoints: Total points across {count, plural, one {# business} other {# businesses}}
wallet.emptyBody: Join a business to see your points and rewards here.

notifications.title: Recent updates
notifications.blurb: Tier upgrades, redemptions, event reminders, and bot replies appear here.
notifications.loadError: We could not load your notifications right now.

profile.dangerBody: Deleting your account now starts a 30-day deletion window, cancels active memberships, and revokes active consents.

profileSettings.title: Account settings
profileSettings.downloadStarted: Your account export download has started.
profileSettings.downloadError: Unable to prepare your account export.
profileSettings.confirmDelete: Delete your Heita account? This will cancel active memberships and start the deletion process.

notificationPreferences.title: Notification preferences
notificationPreferences.description: Choose which channels each business may use when they send you updates. Quiet hours pause push and email, but your in-app feed stays available.
notificationPreferences.emptyState: Join a business to manage per-business notification preferences.

quietHours.enabled: Pause push and email during quiet hours

cookieConsent.title: Cookie choices
cookieConsent.body: Heita uses essential cookies for sign-in, security, and session continuity. You can choose whether we may use non-essential cookies for future analytics and product improvements.

businessProfile.joinPrompt: Sign in, join, and start collecting at every visit.

dashboard.heroBlurb: Manage loyalty, conversations, and AI in one place.
dashboard.activitySummary: {messages} total messages exchanged · {transactions} loyalty transactions logged.

promotions.title: Promotions
promotions.subtitle: Schedule limited-time campaigns, codes, and tier-targeted broadcasts that show up in your customers' notifications.
promotions.broadcastDescription: Broadcasting fans this promotion out as a notification to every eligible member. Double-check the audience before sending — there is no undo.
promotions.emptyState: No promotions yet. Create your first campaign above.
promotions.noTiers: No loyalty tiers configured for this business.
promotions.tierTargetsHint: Leave empty to send to all active members. Select tiers to limit the broadcast audience.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Schedule in-store events, launches, and gatherings. Reminders fan out across WhatsApp, push, and the app feed.
events.emptyUpcoming: No upcoming events. Schedule your first one above.

formLabels.title: Title
formLabels.reminder: Send a reminder the day before

publicEvents.title: What's coming up
publicEvents.subtitle: Reminders fire across WhatsApp, push, and the app feed the day before.

receiptHistory.title: Points and redemption history
receiptHistory.subtitle: Review every loyalty transaction for this business and export it when you need a clean record.
